case_title: MARIA ISABEL SERRANO VS. SHAYDIE THOMPSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARIA ISABEL SERRANO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SHAYDIE THOMPSON. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER DANIEL JACOBS ASSISTED MS. SERRANO AT TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERRANO, MARIA ISABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, SHAYDIE $809.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $859.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
